title: The biological clock that doomed the Neanderthals - David Reich
summary: David Reich discusses a biological clock hypothesis that may explain Neanderthal extinction. This is a genetics and evolutionary biology topic presented on Dwarkesh Patel's podcast, not directly related to artificial intelligence or machine learning.
